articles.title: German Bund Yield on Track for Biggest Weekly Rise in a Year
articles.expand: Germany’s 10-year Bund yield hovered around 2.85%, its highest level since February 4, as investors weighed the inflation risks arising from the escalating conflict in the Middle East. The benchmark yield is on track for a weekly increase of 20 basis points, its largest rise since March of last year, when Germany announced plans for a substantial i...
articles.ai_headline: Rendimiento del Bund alemán a 2.85% su nivel más alto desde febrero: inflación y conflicto en Medio Oriente elevan costes energéticos en zona euro → EUR bajista

articles.title: Brent Soars in Strongest Weekly Rally Since 2022
articles.expand: Brent crude oil futures rose above $85 per barrel on Friday and were headed for their largest weekly gain since 2022, as the intensifying conflict in the Middle East sharply disrupted global energy flows. The turmoil has almost brought shipping through the Strait of Hormuz to a standstill. This key chokepoint typically handles around 20 million bar...
articles.ai_headline: Conflicto en Medio Oriente eleva petróleo Brent a $85 por barril: tensión geopolítica y risk-off global impulsan al USD como refugio → USD alcista

articles.title: Oil Soars in Strongest Weekly Rally Since 2022
articles.expand: WTI crude oil futures rose above $81 per barrel on Friday and were headed for their largest weekly gain since 2022, as the deepening conflict in the Middle East sharply disrupted global energy supplies. The crisis has brought shipping through the Strait of Hormuz — a key corridor that typically handles around 20 million barrels per day of crude and...
articles.ai_headline: Conflicto en Medio Oriente eleva petróleo WTI a $81 por barril: tensión geopolítica y riesgo global impulsan al USD como refugio → USD alcista

articles.title: Euro at Seven-Week Low on Middle East Tensions
articles.expand: The euro hovered around $1.16, near its weakest level since January 16, as investors assessed the deepening conflict in the Middle East and mounting inflation risks. Regional tensions escalated following reports that US President Donald Trump had encouraged Iranian Kurdish forces in Iraq to target Iran, that Azerbaijan warned of retaliation after I...
articles.ai_headline: Tensión en Medio Oriente eleva riesgos inflacionarios: costes energéticos en aumento presionan a la eurozona cerca de $1.16 → EUR bajista

articles.title: Swiss Forex Reserves Down for 3rd Month
articles.expand: The Swiss National Bank’s foreign exchange reserves declined to CHF 710 billion in February 2026, the lowest level since May 2025, down from a revised CHF 712 billion in January. This was the third consecutive monthly decrease in the central bank’s foreign exchange holdings, driven mainly by a drop in other reserve assets (CHF -9 billion, compared ...
articles.ai_headline: Reservas de divisas del SNB caen por tercer mes a CHF 710 mil millones: intervención para frenar apreciación excesiva del franco → CHF bajista

articles.title: US Nonfarm Payrolls Expected to Drop to 59K
articles.expand: The US economy is expected to have added 59K nonfarm payroll jobs in February 2026, a sharp slowdown from the robust 130K gain recorded in January. Part of this deceleration in hiring is likely tied to labor actions by the United Nurses Associations of California/Union of Health Care Professionals (UNAC/UHCP), which are estimated to involve roughly...
articles.ai_headline: Creación de empleos no agrícolas en EEUU se desacelera a 59K en febrero: debilidad laboral sugiere menor presión sobre la Fed para subir tasas → USD bajista

articles.title: UK House Price Growth Above Forecasts
articles.expand: The Halifax House Price Index reported that UK house prices rose by 1.3% year-on-year in February 2026, exceeding the consensus forecast of a 0.9% increase and accelerating from a revised 1.1% gain in January. This marked the fastest annual rate of growth in four months, with the average UK property value reaching a record £301,151. On a monthly ba...
articles.ai_headline: Crecimiento del precio de las viviendas en Reino Unido sube 1.3% interanual en febrero: datos positivos en economías desarrolladas no impactan directamente en la divisa de riesgo NZD → NZD neutral

articles.title: EUR/USD. March 6th. The decline has stopped, but uncertainty lies ahead
articles.expand: During Thursday, the EUR/USD pair returned to the 100.0% corrective level at 1.1577 and once again rebounded from it. Thus, the euro's upward movement may continue toward the 76.4% corrective level at 1.1696. If the pair consolidates below 1.1577, further decline toward the 127.2% Fibonacci level at 1.1440 can be expected. The wave situation on the...
articles.ai_headline: Rebote en nivel de 100.0% de Fibonacci en 1.1577: posible continuación alcista hacia 1.1696, pero consolidación por debajo de 1.1577 podría llevar a caída hacia 1.1440 → EUR neutral

articles.title: USD: Softer payrolls expected – Deutsche Bank
articles.expand: Deutsche Bank economists project a slowdown in February Nonfarm Payrolls to 30k from January’s 130k, with the Unemployment Rate steady at 4.3%.
articles.ai_headline: Creación de empleos más lenta en febrero con 30k nuevos puestos según Deutsche Bank: expectativa de desaceleración económica podría suavizar postura Fed → USD bajista

articles.title: GBP/USD. March 6th. Focus on the Labor Market
articles.expand: On the hourly chart, the GBP/USD pair on Thursday made several attempts to consolidate around the 1.3341–1.3352 level, but overall this area is currently being ignored by traders. A consolidation above it would allow expectations for continued growth toward the resistance level of 1.3437–1.3465. A consolidation below 1.3341–1.3352 would allow expec...
articles.ai_headline: Consolidación de GBP/USD en 1.3341–1.3352: resistencia clave para crecimiento hacia 1.3437–1.3465 depende de datos laborales → GBP alcista

articles.title: Oil prices resume climb to start European morning trade
articles.expand: We're starting to see oil prices approach the highs from yesterday and most notably, WTI crude oil is wanting to hold above the crucial $80 mark. Despite all the volatility and a couple of downside spikes here and there, it's been an otherwise one-sided push higher mostly for oil prices all through this week. Right now, we're seeing WTI crude oil b...
articles.ai_headline: Petróleo WTI sube hacia $80: mayor costo energético para importadores y refugio en activos seguros → USD alcista

articles.title: Gold consolidates around key levels ahead of NFP as we enter the 7th day of US-Iran war
articles.expand: FUNDAMENTAL OVERVIEW Gold got stuck in a consolidation after the selloff experienced at the beginning of the week. We saw mixed and confusing moves across different markets with crude oil being the only one making sense. The focus is of course on the US-Iran war and especially on the Strait of Hormuz, which remains virtually closed. This conflict i...
articles.ai_headline: Conflicto en Irán y cierre del Estrecho de Ormuz elevan riesgo global: refugio seguro en activos como el dólar estadounidense → USD alcista

articles.title: EUR/USD: Respaldado por el reajuste del BCE – ING
articles.expand: Chris Turner de ING destaca que los precios más altos de la energía son negativos para el EUR/USD, pero el reciente reajuste del Banco Central Europeo ha reducido los diferenciales de swap del EUR/USD a algunos de los niveles más ajustados desde 2024
articles.ai_headline: Precios energéticos altos por conflicto geopolítico: mayores costes de importación en zona euro complican el dilema del BCE entre inflación y crecimiento → EUR bajista

articles.title: EUR/USD: Support from ECB repricing – ING
articles.expand: ING’s Chris Turner highlights that higher energy prices are negative for EUR/USD, but recent European Central Bank repricing has narrowed EUR/USD swap differentials to some of the tightest levels since 2024.
articles.ai_headline: Alza de precios energéticos por conflicto geopolítico: mayores costes de importación en zona euro complican política del BCE → EUR bajista

articles.title: BCE: Los riesgos de inflación impulsados por el petróleo aumentan las probabilidades de subida – Deutsche Bank
articles.expand: Deutsche Bank destaca que los mercados ahora asignan una clara probabilidad a una subida de tipos del BCE para diciembre de 2026 a medida que los precios del petróleo se disparan
articles.ai_headline: Precios del petróleo en alza aumentan riesgos de inflación: presión sobre el BCE para subir tasas en diciembre de 2026 → EUR alcista

articles.title: ECB: Oil-driven inflation risks lift hike odds – Deutsche Bank
articles.expand: Deutsche Bank highlights that markets now assign a clear probability to an ECB rate hike by December 2026 as Oil prices surge.
articles.ai_headline: Subida del petróleo eleva riesgos de inflación y probabilidades de alza de tasas del BCE para diciembre de 2026: presión sobre la economía de la eurozona → EUR bajista

articles.title: US Nonfarm Payrolls set to show moderate hiring in February after January’s unusually strong gain
articles.expand: The United States (US) Bureau of Labor Statistics (BLS) will release the Nonfarm Payrolls (NFP) data for February at 13:30 GMT.
articles.ai_headline: Empleo no agrícola en EEUU se espera que muestre contratación moderada en febrero tras el fuerte aumento en enero: datos del BLS pueden influir en la postura de la Fed sobre tasas → USD alcista

articles.title: El gobernador del Banco Popular de China asegura que guiará los ajustes en los niveles de tasas de interés basándose en las operaciones económicas
articles.expand: El gobernador del Banco Popular de China (PBoC), Pan Gongsheng, dijo durante las horas de negociación europeas el viernes que los ajustes de la política monetaria se basarán en las operaciones económicas.
articles.ai_headline: Declaraciones del gobernador del PBoC sobre ajustes de tasas basados en operaciones económicas no afectan directamente el precio del petróleo WTI: ausencia de impacto en exportaciones canadienses de crudo → CAD neutral

articles.title: PBoC’s Pan: Will guide adjustments in interest rate levels based economic operations
articles.expand: People’s Bank of China (PBoC) Governor Pan Gongsheng said during European trading hours on Friday that monetary policy adjustments will be based on economic operations.
articles.ai_headline: Declaraciones del gobernador del PBoC sobre ajustes de tasas basados en operaciones económicas: sin impacto directo en el precio del petróleo WTI → CAD neutral

articles.title: IMF ready to provide assistance to all in need
articles.expand: As the risk of a new global energy crisis gathers momentum, the International Monetary Fund has said it stands ready to assist countries facing balance-of-payments problems amid heightened uncertainty caused by the Middle East conflict. The unstable geopolitical environment, which is driving another rally of energy prices, threatens the economic st...
articles.ai_headline: Conflicto en Medio Oriente eleva precios energéticos: incertidumbre global y posibles problemas de balanza de pagos en Reino Unido → GBP bajista

articles.title: El Banco Central Europeo puede tolerar un pequeño exceso de inflación – Olaf Sleijpen
articles.expand: El responsable de política monetaria del Banco Central Europeo (BCE) y jefe del banco central de los Países Bajos, Olaf Sleijpen, dijo en una entrevista con Reuters que la política monetaria está en un buen momento y que el banco central puede manejar un ligero exceso de inflación.
articles.ai_headline: BCE puede tolerar ligero exceso de inflación: política monetaria acomodaticia mantiene presión sobre tipos de interés en zona euro → EUR bajista

articles.title: USD: Jobs data and yields in focus – Danske Bank
articles.expand: Danske Research Team highlights that the key release is the US February jobs report, where they expect Nonfarm Payrolls to slow to 70k and unemployment to hold at 4.3%. Weekly jobless claims remain low and layoffs are easing, while productivity has cooled and unit labour costs have risen.
articles.ai_headline: Empleo en febrero con 70k nuevos puestos y desempleo en 4.3%: datos laborales esperados para influir en la postura de la Fed → USD alcista

articles.title: UK February Halifax house prices +0.3% vs +0.3% m/m expected
articles.expand: Prior +0.7% Slight delay in the release by the source. UK house prices continue to edge up in February, with the average property price now touching £301,151 - marking a new record high. The annual growth for house prices also accelerated further to 1.3%, its strongest in four months. Halifax notes that: "The housing market built on its steady star...
articles.ai_headline: Precios de viviendas en Reino Unido suben 0.3% en febrero: datos positivos en economía global no impulsan a divisa de riesgo NZD en un entorno de risk-off global → NZD neutral

articles.title: AUD/JPY gains ground to near 111.00 as BoJ signals prolonged rate hold
articles.expand: The AUD/JPY cross attracts some buyers to around 110.90 during the early European session on Friday. The Japanese Yen (JPY) softens against the Australian Dollar (AUD) amid uncertainty surrounding the Bank of Japan's (BoJ) interest rate path.
articles.ai_headline: BoJ señaliza mantener tasas bajas: incertidumbre sobre política monetaria japonesa beneficia a divisa de riesgo como el AUD cerca de 110.90 → AUD alcista

articles.title: USD/CAD Price Forecast: Wobbles near 1.3660 ahead of US NFP data
articles.expand: The USD/CAD pair trades in a tight range around 1.3660 during the European trading session on Friday. The Loonie pair consolidates as the US Dollar wobbles ahead of the United States (US) Nonfarm Payrolls (NFP) data for February, which will be published at 13:30 GMT.
articles.ai_headline: USD/CAD cerca de 1.3660 antes de datos de empleo NFP de EEUU: consolidación del par espera resultados → CAD neutral

articles.title: BOJ policymaker Himino: Underlying inflation gradually accelerating to 2% target
articles.expand: BOJ keeping monetary conditions accommodative Gradually adjusting degree of monetary accommodation Japan is seeing inflation in the sense that consumer prices are rising But it is up to the government to decide whether Japan is out of deflation BOJ does not directly target exchange rate Will continue to scrutinise market moves, impact on the econom...
articles.ai_headline: BOJ mantiene condiciones monetarias acomodaticias con inflación subyacente acelerándose gradualmente hacia el 2%: política dovish continúa → JPY bajista

articles.title: Japan finance minister says will respond nimbly to latest market movements
articles.expand: Japan has not fully exited from deflation Compiling extra budget would of course be an option as said before Government ready to take steps in a timely manner to combat economic impact from US-Iran conflict Markets are making big moves so we will respond nimbly while closely communicating with peers With all the focus on the Middle East, we may get...
articles.ai_headline: Ministro de Finanzas de Japón anuncia respuesta ágil a movimientos del mercado: preocupación por impacto económico del conflicto US-Irán y persistencia de la deflación en Japón → JPY mixto

articles.title: In the World, There Is Only One Gold
articles.expand: Bitcoin still shows no particular desire to grow, but over the last couple of days, it has risen by several thousand dollars. However, at the moment, this growth does not allow it to break out of the flat. A deviation has formed near the upper boundary of the sideways channel, so today or tomorrow, the first cryptocurrency may head back to the lowe...

articles.title: Pound Sterling ticks up against US Dollar in countdown to US NFP
articles.expand: The Pound Sterling trades marginally higher to near 1.3365 against the US Dollar (USD) during the Asian trading session on Friday. The GBP/USD pair edges up as the US Dollar ticks down ahead of the United States (US) Nonfarm Payrolls (NFP) data for February, which will be published at 13:30 GMT.
articles.ai_headline: Antes del anuncio de empleo no agrícola en EE UU, el dólar estadounidense cae: la libra esterlina sube marginalmente a 1.3365 → GBP alcista

articles.title: Australian Dollar strengthens against its peers ahead of US NFP data
articles.expand: The AUD/USD pair trades 0.4% higher to near 0.7040 during the Asian trading session on Friday. The Aussie pair demonstrates strength as the Australian Dollar (AUD) outperforms across the board on expectations that the Reserve Bank of Australia (RBA) could deliver another interest rate hike soon.
articles.ai_headline: Expectativas de subida de tasas del RBA impulsan al AUD: cotización sube 0.4% a 0.7040 → AUD alcista

articles.title: Chart Art: CAD/CHF Trend Reversal and Correction
articles.expand: With rising crude oil prices seemingly outweighing risk-off flows for the Loonie, CAD/CHF managed to break above its falling trend line on the 4-hour chart. Can the reversal gain traction from here?
articles.ai_headline: Petróleo WTI sube: soporte estructural para exportaciones canadienses de crudo → CAD alcista

articles.title: Australian dollar climbs as a positive risk mood leads to US dollar selling
articles.expand: The mood is improving in Asia. The steady selling of risk assets and flight to the US dollar has given way to some optimism in Asia and that's reflected in decent bids in the Australian dollar and broad USD weakness. That's come with some oil selling as the US floats more measures to stop the runaway rise in crude prices. Notably, gold remains stro...
articles.ai_headline: Mejor ánimo de riesgo en Asia y debilidad del USD: optimismo en commodities y ciclo chino → AUD alcista

articles.title: GBP/USD Overview on March 6. Can We Forget About Easing Monetary Policy?
articles.expand: The GBP/USD currency pair continues to maintain a downward trend on the 4-hour timeframe, and on Thursday, it held on for most of the day, trying not to drop further. Overall, the initial market shock has subsided, so we no longer see grounds for further declines driven solely by geopolitical factors. There are no other reasons for the dollar to gr...
articles.ai_headline: Shock geopolítico inicial subside sin nuevos factores de presión sobre la libra: tendencia a la baja se mantiene en ausencia de señales de flexibilización de la política monetaria del BoE → GBP bajista

articles.title: Trading Recommendations and Analysis for GBP/USD on March 6. The Pound Holds Above the 33 Level
articles.expand: Analysis of GBP/USD 5M The GBP/USD currency pair continued to move in a "meat grinder" style on Thursday. Throughout the day, the price changed direction several times, remaining within a narrow range. There were no clear reasons for such frequent directional changes, and only one secondary report was published during the day in both the UK and the...
articles.ai_headline: GBP/USD se mantiene por encima del nivel 1.33 en un día de alta volatilidad sin noticias económicas significativas en Reino Unido: estabilidad técnica temporal → GBP neutral

articles.title: Scotiabank's base case is USMCA renewal — but the tail risks are worth pricing
articles.expand: The clock is ticking on the USMCA joint review and Scotiabank just released a comprehensive report that's worth a read. "The future of [USMCA] is the single most consequential macro uncertainty facing the Canadian economy this year," the report says. The good news first: Scotiabank's baseline is that USMCA gets ratified or extended with limited adj...
articles.ai_headline: Renovación del USMCA como caso base de Scotiabank: riesgos de cola significativos pero ratificación esperada con ajustes limitados → CAD alcista

articles.title: How Will Events Unfold in Iran?
articles.expand: The war in Iran has been ongoing for six days, and the market is starting to wonder when it will end. In these six days, the entire world has faced the threat of a severe energy crisis due to Iran's strikes on oil refineries in the Middle East and the destruction of liquefied natural gas facilities in Qatar. There is no doubt that Iran will continu...
articles.ai_headline: Guerra en Irán desencadena aversión al riesgo global: seis días de conflicto elevan incertidumbre y presión sobre divisas de alto riesgo → NZD bajista

articles.title: What Can Be Considered a Victory in the US War Against Iran? Part 2
articles.expand: Based on the previous overview, it can be concluded that a full eradication of Iran's nuclear production, missile stockpiles, and drones would require a ground operation involving a vast number of infantry. This operation would need to take place in a country whose territory, remember, is larger than any European state, is primarily mountainous, an...
articles.ai_headline: Escalada de tensión en Oriente Medio por conflicto potencial con Irán: riesgo global aumenta y desencadena aversión al riesgo → NZD bajista

articles.title: USDCHF Technical Analysis: "Swissie" grinds within tight 40-Pip range
articles.expand: The USD/CHF is currently locked in a confined 40-pip trading range as the market searches for a definitive catalyst. Buyers and sellers are battling for control, with price action oscillating between key technical "swing areas." Key Technical Levels to Watch 1. articles.title: Swiss CPI rises 0.6% mom in February, annual inflation holds at 0.1%
articles.expand: Switzerland’s consumer prices rose more than expected in February, offering a modest sign of price pressure despite still subdued annual inflation. Data from the Federal Statistical Office showed CPI increased 0.6% mom, slightly above the expected 0.5% gain. Core CPI, which excludes fresh and seasonal products as well as energy and fuel, rose by 0....
articles.ai_headline: Inflación suiza sube 0.6% en febrero: presión moderada sobre precios → CHF alcista
